title: Big Globe - Mythic Metals Compatibility
description: A compatibility Datapack between Big Globe and Mythic Metals
body:
A compatibility Datapack that places the various ores from Mythic Metals into a Big Globe world

Ore Spawn Locations below:

  Overworld:
  
    Adamantite  - y level -668 and below
    Aquarium    - Underneath the Ocean floor or anywhere in Dripping Caves
    Banglum     - Between y level 75 and -100
    Carmot      - Between y level -400 and -500
    Kyber       - Below y level 0 within Calcite
    Manganese   - Between y level -100 and -500
    Morkite     - Between y level -300 and -600
    Mythril     - Between y level -400 and -500
    Orichalcum  - Below y level -400
    Osmium      - Above y level 128
    Platinum    - Between y level -100 and -500
    Prometheum  - Underneath the surface of Warm Biomes or anywhere in Lush Caves
    Quadrillum  - Between y level -30 and -400
    Runite      - Between y level 50 and -100
    Silver      - Between y level -30 and -400
    Starrite    - Above y level 150 less than 5 blocks from the surface
    Tin         - Between y level 50 and -200
    Unobtainium - Anywhere in The Deep Dark
    
  Nether:
  
    Midas Gold  - All y levels
    Banglum     - Above y level 500
    Palladium   - Below y level 128 in the Inferno biome and Below y level 64 everywhere else (lava ocean level)
    Stormyx     - Below y level 500
    
  End:
  
    Starrite    - All y levels

(Carmot, Mythril, Platinum, Silver, and Unobtainium all are additionally set to spawn below y level -850 to allow hot magma/stone to convert into them within The Core)
